title: Project Telos Twenty-Fifth Wave Social Comment Claims

claims.text: The twenty-fifth wave social comment packet records the refreshed Project Telos tool snapshot for Index, Forum, Gather, Crucible, and Telos before drafting.
claims.falsification: The packet omits the refreshed tool snapshot or records versions/statuses inconsistent with the MCP status checks.

claims.text: The packet provides exact text for 27 prepared public comments across Reddit, YouTube, and blog/social discussion surfaces.
claims.falsification: The packet contains fewer than 27 exact comment entries or lacks coverage across Reddit, YouTube, and blog/social platform classes.

claims.text: The packet preserves the public side-effect boundary by marking all comments as prepared but not posted and requiring exact action-time confirmation before posting.
claims.falsification: The packet claims comments were posted or authorizes posting without exact destination and exact-text confirmation.

claims.text: The packet excludes exact AI-drafted comments for r/cybersecurity because the visible subreddit rules forbid AI or machine-generated content.
claims.falsification: The packet includes exact AI-drafted comments for r/cybersecurity or omits the subreddit-rule exclusion note.

claims.text: The exact comment texts avoid direct Project Telos repository links and frame outreach as technical participation rather than link promotion.
claims.falsification: The exact comment text includes a direct Project Telos repository URL or uses generic promotional copy disconnected from the target discussion.
